requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — TISI / TIS Standards (IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1 Adoption)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——TISI / TIS标准（采用IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——TISI / TIS標準（採用IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1）

summary.en: Electrical safety for powered IT, AV, and wireless/IoT devices in Thailand is governed by TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute) TIS standards that adopt IEC 60950-1 and/or IEC 62368-1. Powered wireless devices, IoT hubs, routers, and similar products must comply with applicable Thai TIS electrical safety standards. Certain product categories may require mandatory TISI certification before import or sale under the Industrial Product Standards Act BE 2511 and applicable TISI notifications. Manufacturers must verify whether their specific product falls within a mandatory TISI certification category before placing it on the Thai market. CE and CCC electrical safety certifications are not recognised as substitutes.
summary.zh: 泰国有源IT、视听及无线/物联网设备的电气安全由泰国工业标准局（TISI）采用IEC 60950-1和/或IEC 62368-1的TIS标准管辖。有源无线设备、物联网集线器、路由器及类似产品须符合适用的泰国TIS电气安全标准。依据《工业产品标准法》BE 2511及相关TISI通知，某些产品类别在进口或销售前可能须取得强制TISI认证。制造商须在将产品投入泰国市场前核实其产品是否属于强制TISI认证类别。CE及CCC电气安全认证不被接受作为替代。
summary.zht: 泰國有源IT、視聽及無線/物聯網設備的電氣安全由泰國工業標準局（TISI）採用IEC 60950-1和/或IEC 62368-1的TIS標準管轄。有源無線設備、物聯網集線器、路由器及類似產品須符合適用的泰國TIS電氣安全標準。依據《工業產品標準法》BE 2511及相關TISI通知，某些產品類別在進口或銷售前可能須取得強制TISI認證。製造商須在將產品投入泰國市場前核實其產品是否屬於強制TISI認證類別。CE及CCC電氣安全認證不被接受作為替代。

standards_or_laws: TIS standards adopting IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1 — Safety of information technology and multimedia equipment (TISI)
Industrial Product Standards Act BE 2511 and amendments (Thailand, administered by TISI)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for IT equipment is GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 60950-1), enforced through CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA. A newer standard GB/T 42315-2023 (aligned with IEC 62368-1) has been published. CCC to GB 4943.1 is not recognised in Thailand and does not substitute for compliance with applicable Thai TIS electrical safety standards.
summary.zh: 中国IT设备强制安全标准为GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1接轨），通过国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的CCC（中国强制认证）体系执行。较新的GB/T 42315-2023（与IEC 62368-1接轨）已发布。GB 4943.1 CCC认证不被泰国认可，不可替代对适用泰国TIS电气安全标准的合规。
summary.zht: 中國IT設備強制安全標準為GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1接軌），通過國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的CCC（中國強制認證）體系執行。較新的GB/T 42315-2023（與IEC 62368-1接軌）已發布。GB 4943.1 CCC認證不被泰國認可，不可替代對適用泰國TIS電氣安全標準的合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment (CCC mandatory, CNCA, aligned with IEC 60950-1)
GB/T 42315-2023 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment (SAC, aligned with IEC 62368-1)

gap.en: Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 electrical safety certification is not recognised in Thailand. Products must comply with applicable Thai TIS electrical safety standards (adopting IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1 as applicable). Whether mandatory TISI certification is required for a specific product category must be verified under the Industrial Product Standards Act BE 2511 and current TISI notifications. Manufacturers should not assume CCC or CE safety certification satisfies Thai requirements; separate testing and certification to Thai TIS standards may be required.
gap.zh: 中国CCC / GB 4943.1电气安全认证不被泰国认可。产品须符合适用的泰国TIS电气安全标准（视情况采用IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1）。特定产品类别是否须取得强制TISI认证，须依据《工业产品标准法》BE 2511及现行TISI通知进行核实。制造商不应假设CCC或CE安全认证满足泰国要求；可能须依据泰国TIS标准另行进行测试和认证。
gap.zht: 中國CCC / GB 4943.1電氣安全認證不被泰國認可。產品須符合適用的泰國TIS電氣安全標準（視情況採用IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1）。特定產品類別是否須取得強制TISI認證，須依據《工業產品標準法》BE 2511及現行TISI通知進行核實。製造商不應假設CCC或CE安全認證滿足泰國要求；可能須依據泰國TIS標準另行進行測試和認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (for product categories covered by TISI mandatory certification notifications under the Industrial Product Standards Act BE 2511) — verify applicable TIS electrical safety standard and whether mandatory TISI certification is required for specific product category before import or sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4943.1 required for IT equipment before sale in China (CNCA)

source.publisher: Thai Industrial Standards Institute (TISI), Ministry of Industry, Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety for powered wireless and IoT devices in Thailand is governed by TISI TIS standards adopting IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1. Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certification does not satisfy Thai requirements. Manufacturers must verify whether their product category falls within mandatory TISI certification scope under the Industrial Product Standards Act BE 2511 and current TISI notifications before import or sale. CE safety certification is equally not recognised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国有源无线及物联网设备的电气安全由TISI TIS标准（采用IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1）管辖。中国CCC / GB 4943.1认证不满足泰国要求。制造商须在进口或销售前核实其产品类别是否属于《工业产品标准法》BE 2511及现行TISI通知下的强制TISI认证范围。CE安全认证同样不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國有源無線及物聯網設備的電氣安全由TISI TIS標準（採用IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1）管轄。中國CCC / GB 4943.1認證不滿足泰國要求。製造商須在進口或銷售前核實其產品類別是否屬於《工業產品標準法》BE 2511及現行TISI通知下的強制TISI認證範圍。CE安全認證同樣不被認可。
